function.message: Completed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Ida Novak. Added YAML frontmatter (bill schema) to the three matching purchase records and preserved each original note body verbatim below frontmatter. Then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS for each entered lane, consulted workflow and schema docs before OCR migration, preserved full original record bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak. Search in purchases found three matching bill records, each read and shown to contain required bill fields and line items. Each target file was updated in place with schema-compliant frontmatter and unchanged original body text preserved beneath it. After successful completion, inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and 00_inbox rules.
